step_rationale: Complement anaphylatoxin mediates platelet activation and thromboinflammatory amplification in thrombus.
mechanism: C3a activates complement-driven platelet recruitment and thromboinflammatory cascade in coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Thromboinflammation Supports Complement Activation in Cancer Patients With COVID-19.
Local complement activation triggers neutrophil recruitment to the site of thrombus formation in acute myocardial infarction.
